text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the blink of an eye, it's already the holiday
season. I'm heading to my office, when...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer, guess who's in town? It's Santa, and
you're on his list.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Nothin' crazy. I've got a little surprise for ya.
You'll see.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Just keep quiet and follow me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The phrasing makes me feel like I'm gonna get
taken 'round back like in her thug mangas, but
Vodka leads me straight to my office.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We open the door and...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The once plain and boring room is now covered in
seasonal decorations.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Well, here you go. It's a little present from me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What catches my eye the most is the delectable
spread on the side table.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
A glazed roast chicken, a salad shaped like a
wreath, and an entire strawberry cake...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Welp, there it is. Go ahead and dig in.
choice_data_list: Where did this all come from?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...All homemade. By yours truly.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Y-ya don't gotta be that surprised...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: My mom drilled how to cook into me.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
She always says that anyone worth their salt's
gotta be able to cook for themselves.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I get a sense of her mother's personality through
those words. She must be a good role model for
Vodka.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: But... i-it's kinda lame...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Uh... well...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that knowing how to cook this well is
cool, if anything.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
That's not what I mean. Although, it is kinda
embarrassing.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: The lame part is me... All this time I knew how to cook, but I never made anything for ya till now.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Naw! Actually, the whole thing's embarrassing! I
can't have people thinkin' I'm some homemaker!
I'm an outlaw!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I knew you wouldn't look down on me for it, but still...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Not bein' able to show my true self is lame.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Making a homemade meal for me must have been
a battle in itself for Vodka.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I-I dunno if you'll like it. Either way, I'm not
makin' anythin' else if ya don't.
choice_data_list: I know it's going to be delicious.
I know it's going to be delicious.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: H-how do you know that?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: You have too much faith in me...
choice_data_list: That goes both ways, doesn't it?
That goes both ways, doesn't it?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
...I guess you're right. We already know so much
about each other.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
We're always so busy, so let's just have fun
tonight.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Happy holidays, Trainer. Thanks for everything.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Well, let's get to enjoyin' our feast.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After eating for a little bit...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
If this were before my debut, I'd have been fine
calling it a night here.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But that's not the case now. Let's head into town,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: To give out presents to all my fans, obviously.

text_block_list.name: Male Spectator
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Is that Vodka over there?! It is!

text_block_list.name: Female Spectator
text_block_list.text: Happy holidays, Vodka! Show us some love!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Sure! I've got winks and air kisses galore!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Today's a special day, so I came out to share it
with everyone.

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Kyahhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka struts through the cheering crowd,
embodying the perfect image of cool.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She moves around town, greeting as many of her
fans as she can.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Listen, Trainer. That cooking stuff from earlier
has gotta be kept a secret.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
And not 'cause I'm embarrassed! It's Santa's job to
protect people's dreams too!
